name: Lentil Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1 large green chile or green bell pepper, chopped
2 teaspoons green taco sauce (or salsa verde)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lentils per package directions.
2. Meanwhile, in a large skillet, sauté onion and green pepper until onion is soft.
3. Drain lentils, but save 1 cup of liquid for sauce. Add lentils to skillet and mix in cheese. Divide mixture between six tortillas and roll up.
4. To prepare sauce: Combine 1 cup of lentil water and tomato sauce in a saucepan. Add taco sauce and bring to a boil. Mix cornstarch with a little of the mixture from saucepan and add to sauce. Cook, stirring constantly, until hot and thickened.
5. Pour sauce over burritos. Place in a hot oven for a few minutes to heat thoroughly.
6. Serve topped with sour cream or guacamole.
